description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with a matte blue and black exterior, featuring two wide slots on top for toasting bread. The front panel displays a triangular emblem with a snowflake, possibly indicating a defrost function, while the rear panel has a lever and two round buttons, likely for operation and settings. The sides are smooth and unadorned, with a subtle metallic sheen. Toasted bread is visible protruding from the slots, showing a golden-brown surface. The toaster stands on four small feet, elevating it slightly above the surface. The overall design is modern and functional, with clearly defined interactive elements.
description: A modern blue and black toaster with two wide slots, visible toast, and front-facing controls and emblem.
description_view_0: Front view shows a blue panel with a triangular snowflake emblem and the two toast slots on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the black body, blue side panels, and a clear view of the toasted bread inside the slot.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a blue panel with a lever and two round buttons, as well as the toast slots above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the black body, blue side, and toasted bread.
attribute_brand_logo: A triangular emblem with a snowflake symbol is present on the front blue panel; no readable text or brand name.
attribute_control_knobs: Two round buttons and a vertical lever are located on the rear blue panel; buttons are unmarked and the lever is rectangular.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular toast slots are positioned on top, spaced evenly apart, with visible toasted bread inside.
